name: Vanilla Genoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl with an electric mixer, combine egg yolks, 1 cup sugar, salt, and vanilla. Whisk on high speed until thick, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Reduce speed to medium and slowly add hot water. Scrape down sides of the bowl. Increase to high speed and whip until thick again.
4. Fold in flour and melted butter. Set aside.
5. In a clean bowl with an electric mixer, whip egg whites on medium speed until frothy. Increase to high speed and slowly add remaining 1/2 cup sugar. Whip until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold whipped egg whites into the reserved batter.
7. Spread batter in prepared baking tray.
8. Bake until golden brown and springs back lightly when touched, about 20-25 minutes.
9. Cool cake in pan. Remove from pan by running knife along inside edge, then invert onto work surface. Carefully peel off parchment paper.
The genoise can be made up to two days in advance. Store wrapped in plastic wrap at room temperature. It also freezes well.
